response.original_title: Playboy UK The Best of Night Calls 2
response.overview: The red-hot, live sex action of the Best of Night Calls had you crying out for more, so now the girls are back on that sofa to bring you a second sizzling installment from Playboy TV's sexy show. This time, the truly raunchy Emma is joined by her co-host Jodi and they've selected their favourite moments from the show for you to enjoy in the comfort of your own home; We all know Emma has a wet-spot for fetish and Jodi just loves taking control, so this video promises to bring you to even more of a climax than their last appearance! Part one, Taking Control, explores the erotic fantasies and desires of men and women who love to dominate or be dominated.
response.title: Playboy UK The Best of Night Calls 2
